adventure.explanation: The granfondo explores the diverse landscapes of Sicó Lands starting from Pombal on 29 March 2026, combining a time trial from Leiria to Praia do Pedrógão with mass participation routes known for their rich heritage.

altitude.explanation: While specific peak altitudes remain unconfirmed, the Leiria region's varied terrain contributes to moderate altitude challenges across the ~92-mile course.

climate.explanation: Held on 29 March 2026 in Pombal, the event benefits from Portugal's mild spring climate, ideal for the 6,500 ft of climbing without extreme weather risks.

community.explanation: Bib pick-up spans multiple locations including Pombal Centro de Exposições on 28 March 15:00–19:30 and 29 March 07:30–09:15, fostering weekend engagement for cyclists aged 19+.

elevation.explanation: ~6,500 ft of elevation gain over ~92 miles from Pombal challenges riders in the Sicó Lands region on 29 March 2026.

expenses.explanation: As the sole Portuguese UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier, top 25% finishers in Pombal earn spots for the 2026 Worlds in Niseko, Japan, enhancing value.

experience.explanation: The two-day format features a time trial on 28 March from Leiria to Praia do Pedrógão at 10:00, followed by granfondo start at 09:00 in Pombal.

field_depth.explanation: Relocated from Coimbra to Leiria region for 28-29 March 2026 due to municipal changes, the field's competitive depth is still developing as course details finalize.

length.explanation: The granfondo covers ~92 miles starting from Centro de Exposições de Pombal on 29 March 2026.

logistics.explanation: Organized by Cabreira Solutions with bib collection at Pombal on 28 March 15:00–19:30, the event ensures smooth transitions from Leiria time trial to Pombal granfondo.

race_quality.explanation: Routes in Leiria e Pombal are designed as challenging and technically demanding, upholding UCI standards for the 29 March 2026 granfondo.

technicality.explanation: The Sicó Lands terrain near Pombal introduces moderate technical demands, with full course details pending for the 29 March 2026 edition.

value.explanation: Qualifiers from the 29 March Pombal granfondo secure entries to the 2026 UCI Worlds in Niseko, Japan, for top 25% finishers.

cultural_impact.explanation: Boosts Portugal's gran fondo scene by relocating successful Coimbra event to historic Pombal area.

prestige.explanation: This UCI Gran Fondo World Series event in Pombal awards qualification to the 2026 Championships in Niseko for top 25% in age/gender categories.

course_description.character: Rolling road gran fondo through Leiria region's pine forests, medieval castle towns, and coastal plains, blending sustained climbs with technical descents in Serra de Sicó landscapes.

suffering_zones.label: Serra de Sicó Climbs
suffering_zones.description: Key ascents in the limestone hills north of Pombal deliver the bulk of elevation gain amid scenic pine forests.

suffering_zones.label: Coastal Time Trial
suffering_zones.description: 20.5km out-and-back from Leiria to Praia do Pedrogão tests solo power on undulating seaside roads.

suffering_zones.label: Pombal Fortress Finish
suffering_zones.description: Final ramps into historic Pombal castle town after 93km of attrition for a dramatic mass sprint.

course_description.signature_challenge: The Serra de Sicó undulations combining 6500ft of climbing with fast, technical descents through central Portugal's karst terrain.

logistics.overview: Two-day UCI qualifier: Time trial Sat March 28 in Leiria/Praia do Pedrogão; Granfondo Sun March 29 in Pombal. Packet pickup Fri-Sun at both sites. Aid stations, pasta party, electronic timing.
logistics.accommodation: Pombal offers heritage hotels near castle; Leiria has vibrant options; nearby beaches like Praia do Pedrogão for coastal stays. Book early for March weekend.
logistics.getting_there: Fly into Lisbon (1.5hr drive) or Porto (2hr); trains to Leiria/Coimbra then taxi/bus to Pombal. Central location between major cities.
logistics.parking: Ample at Centro de Exposições de Pombal (Granfondo start/finish) and Praia do Pedrogão (TT).
logistics.spectator_info: Prime viewing at Pombal expo center finish line, castle area, and Pedrogão beach TT turnaround. Festive atmosphere with family zones.

climate.overview: Mild spring conditions in central Portugal's coastal-influenced Leiria region.
climate.wind_conditions: Moderate coastal breezes, stronger near Praia do Pedrogão
climate.altitude_effects: Minimal; lowlands to 1300ft Serra de Sicó passes with negligible hypoxia risk.

terrain.terrain_overview: Fully paved roads through rolling hills, pine forests, and open plains of Leiria and Serra de Sicó, with short steep pitches and sustained moderate climbs.
terrain.key_features: Templar castle in Pombal, Atlantic coastal flats near Pedrogão, limestone karst formations, and historic villages.

history.overview: Portugal's premier UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier, evolved from successful Granfondo Coimbra Region, relocated to Leiria/Pombal for 2026 with enhanced regional focus.
history.notable_editions: Inaugural 2026 edition as UCI GFWS event; top 25% qualifiers earn spots to 2026 Worlds in Niseko, Japan.
history.growth_trajectory: Rapid ascent as sole Portuguese qualifier; builds on Coimbra legacy amid regional municipal shifts, promising annual expansion.

final_verdict.one_liner: UCI qualifier gem in Portugal's scenic heartland blending heritage, climbs, and coast.
final_verdict.best_for: Age-group warriors chasing Worlds qualification, Euro road enthusiasts seeking value-packed weekend racing.
final_verdict.not_ideal_for: Gravel purists or high-altitude seekers; entry-level beginners may find 93km daunting.
final_verdict.pro_tip: Combine TT + Granfondo for full qualifier points; arrive early for Pombal's castle vibes and pasta party recovery.

citations.title: Granfondo Leiria Region - UCI Gran Fondo World Series
citations.snippet: Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands ; Date. Saturday 28.03.2026 - 29.03.2026 ; Distances. 20 - 93 - 146 km ; City. Pombal ; Country. Portugal.

citations.title: GRANFONDO LEIRIA REGION - RaceFinder
citations.snippet: The Granfondo Leiria Region is a road cycling event taking place on March 28 and 29, 2026, in the Leiria region of Portugal. It features an individual time trial on the first day and Granfondo/Mediofondo mass participation races on the second day.

citations.title: Portuguese UCI Gran Fondo World Series Event Moves to Leiria Region
citations.snippet: The revised program includes a time trial on 28 March between Leiria and Praia do Pedrógão and the granfondo on 29 March starting in Pombal.

citations.title: GRAN FONDO WORLDS QUALIFIER IN PORTUGAL GETS NEW DATE AND VENUE
citations.snippet: Granfondo Leiria Region – Sicó Lands on 28-29 March in Leiria. Events includes a time trial on Saturday between Leiria and Praia do Pedrogão, followed by a gran fondo on Sunday starting in Pombal.
